fields.description: Should a vacation response be sent if a message arrives between the From Date and To Date?
fields.label: Enabled

fields.description: Messages that arrive on or after this date-time (but before the To Date if defined) should receive the user's vacation response.
fields.label: From Date

fields.description: Messages that arrive before this date-time (but on or after the From Date if defined) should receive the user's vacation response.
fields.label: To Date

fields.description: The subject that will be used by the message sent in response to messages when the vacation response is enabled.
fields.label: Subject

fields.description: The plaintext body to send in response to messages when the vacation response is enabled.
fields.label: Text

fields.description: The HTML body to send in response to messages when the vacation response is enabled.
fields.label: HTML

fields.description: The account this vacation response belongs to.
fields.label: Account
